name: cde-growth
title: Catalog Growth & Discovery
description: CDE-authored — assets by source, assets by sensitivity & cumulative catalog growth over PDC-BIDB-EXT.

dataAccesses.name: AssetsBySource
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(dd.datasource_type,''),'Unknown') AS src, SUM(s.entity_count) AS assets FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_datasource dd ON s.datasource_key=dd.datasource_key GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: AssetsBySensitivity
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(sensitivity,''),'Unclassified') AS s, count(*) AS assets FROM dim_entity GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: CumulativeGrowth
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT month, cumulative FROM ( SELECT d.year_month_name AS month, d.year_month_number AS ym, SUM(SUM(s.entity_count)) OVER (ORDER BY d.year_month_number) AS cumulative FROM fact_entity_snapshot s JOIN dim_date d ON s.scanned_date_key=d.date_key WHERE s.scanned_date_key<>19000101 GROUP BY 1,2 ) t ORDER BY ym
